<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band12-1_chunk001.pdf#page=12 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band12 p22 -->

<!-- header: ALBACHING -->

<!-- header: ALBACHING -->


[[File:Band12-1_chunk001_p012_img001.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band12-1_chunk001_p012_img002.jpg|thumb|St. Nikolaus als Fürbitter (Thomas Christian Wink 1791/92)]]
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band12 p23 -->
